text.title: DDD Aggregates Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping invariant scope + aggregate size to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the entity cluster have non-trivial invariants?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: CRUD entity without invariants does not need aggregate discipline

branch.question: Do invariants span more than one candidate root?

conclusion.verdict: redesign: each root owns its invariants; cross-root consistency becomes eventual via domain events
split the aggregate along a sub-invariant boundary before proceeding
proceed: root + command methods + invariant tests per 01-core-rules

text.example: invariants=present → cross_root_invariants=false (order invariants live within Order) → too_big=false (Order + OrderItem = 2 entities) → proceed; Order.place(), Order.cancel() with invariants; raise OrderPlaced + OrderCancelled.
